name: qx9_share_bound_late
drl:
query BPair(long $a, long $b)
    B2(k == $a, u == $b)
end

rule QR1 salience 10
when
    T($tv : t)
    ?BPair($tv, $w;)
then
    insert(new Out(1, $w));
end

rule R0 salience 5
when
    T(t == 0)
then
    insert(new B2(0, 77));
end

rule QR2 salience -5
when
    T($tv : t)
    ?BPair($tv, $w;)
then
    insert(new Out(2, $w));
end
